hero.lead: KREA is a creative technology studio. We build brands, products and digital worlds at the intersection of art, code and intelligence.

brand.title: Brand & Identity
brand.desc: Strategy, naming, visual system and tone of voice. From idea to a finished system.

product.title: Product Design
product.desc: Interfaces with character and internal logic. From first sketch to release.

motion.title: Motion Design
motion.desc: Living, cinematic movement. It brings interfaces to life and makes brands tangible.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.desc: Generative tools, smart flows, living interfaces. Technology that stays beautiful.

web.title: Web Engineering
web.desc: Next.js, edge infrastructure, CMS, WebGL. Sites built for speed and the long run.

three.title: 3D & Interactive
three.desc: Three.js, shaders, real-time rendering. Worlds you step into right in the browser.

philosophy.quote: Design is the last bridge between intent and outcome. We build it like infrastructure and treat it like cinema.

process.label: Process / 003
process.title: From first signal to finished product.

steps.name: Listen & immerse
steps.desc: Conversation, audit, diagnosis. Before a single pixel moves, the essence is already clear.

steps.name: Set the direction
steps.desc: Positioning, brand story, principles. The team aligns on one course and holds it.

steps.name: Design in motion
steps.desc: Identity, screens and motion language are born together. Static is dead — we design movement from day one.

steps.name: Build & ship
steps.desc: All engineering is ours: Next.js, edge, 3D. Design and code move side by side until the comp matches to the pixel.

steps.name: Grow it further
steps.desc: We don't disappear after launch. Quarterly reviews, evolving systems, a long-term partnership.

items.q: KREA didn't just refresh our product — they changed how people relate to money. Every screen is considered down to the detail.
The craft is rare. They engineer motion the way Pixar builds a frame: calculation behind every move.
We've worked with the top studios in London and New York. KREA is another league. Quieter, sharper, closer to an atelier.

form.label: Get in touch / 005
form.title: Let's make something worth it.
form.lead: Tell us about your task. We'll reply within a business day.
form.name: Name
form.successText: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within a business day.
form.error: Couldn't send. Please try again or contact us directly.
form.required: Please fill in the required fields
